name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor using the metal blade, blend together the garlic, egg, and anchovies until smooth.
2. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
3. Stir in the olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, catsup, Worcestershire sauce, mustards (Creole, dry mustard, Dijon), paprika, salt, and pepper.
4. The sauce can be stored well in the refrigerator and will make approximately 2 cups.
